## 4D-RGPT: Toward Region-level 4D Understanding via Perceptual Distillation

This skill implements techniques from the paper: 4D-RGPT: Toward Region-level 4D Understanding via Perceptual Distillation

### Core Concept

This paper presents a novel approach to solving important problems in machine learning and AI. The key innovation involves advanced methods that improve existing techniques.
